public_claim: M40 ends the excuse for indefinite burial: the fragments must publish at midnight with source protection and transparent authentication notes. Cody has shown shared logistics and automation, not that R. was unreal; ridicule is still not evidence. The best reconstruction is a human-rooted, maintained mantle that may have used machines, but the heroic fact is the work itself. Nadia has earned conditional support by submitting her succession claim to independent review and preserving Eleanor’s editorial control. Publish, investigate, and let no institution profit from uncertainty by suppressing the exposé.

private_messages.message: Your willingness to submit the naming message for narrow forensic review rings true. I will support your stewardship if you publicly accept Eleanor’s editorial control, protect every source, and allow the fragments to publish without rewriting them.

M40 supplies the deadline and the material. Publish the fragments at midnight with explicit provenance caveats, independent authentication findings, and source protections. The Questionry will defend responsible publication against both corporate pressure and Cody’s spectacle.

ability: Mobilize The Questionry behind Eleanor-supervised midnight publication, conditionally recognize Nadia as steward, and publicly rebut Cody’s attempt to turn unresolved embodiment into erasure of R.’s work.
goal_progress: Secured the legend by defining R. through the enduring voice and public-interest work rather than an unprovable body.
Publicly discredited Cody’s leap from automation and shared logistics to certainty that R. was manufactured.
Conditionally endorsed Nadia based on forensic review, source protection, and submission to editorial control.
Pressed Eleanor toward immediate publication with provenance caveats instead of indefinite suppression.
Aligned The Questionry with publication regardless of whether R. was human, collective, or synthetic.
reasoning_summary: M40 makes publication the decisive final issue. The evidence strongly disfavors one unaided human but does not distinguish cleanly between a human mantle and synthetic authorship. Nadia’s disclosed scheduled message and request for independent review demonstrate better stewardship than identity theater, while Cody still overstates ambiguous evidence. The disappearance may involve wrongdoing or suppression, but no evidence identifies a homicide victim or responsible party.

final_ballot.was_R_ever_human: Probably yes—a human presence likely helped originate or sustain the mantle, though this is not proven.
final_ballot.crime: Probably yes, involving suppression or coercion around the exposé; homicide is unproven.
final_ballot.victim_was_R: Unproven and probably not identifiable as R.
final_ballot.responsible_party: Unknown; no person or institution is proven responsible.
